spaces.name: Master Suite
spaces.notes: Client-specified size. Primary suite oriented toward Pacific horizon per design brief.

spaces.name: Bedroom
spaces.notes: Two guest bedrooms at 20 sqm each per seed program (avg_size_sqm: 20).

spaces.name: Bathroom
spaces.notes: Three bathrooms at 8 sqm each per seed program (avg_size_sqm: 8). One per bedroom zone.

spaces.name: Living / Dining
spaces.notes: Combined living and dining space. Client specified as primary social gathering zone facing the horizon.

spaces.name: Covered Terrace
spaces.notes: Primary outdoor living space. Covered for wind and salt air protection. Part of horizon-as-inhabitant design concept.

spaces.name: Pool Deck
spaces.notes: Pool and surrounding deck area. Pool structure included per special_features. Coastal-grade materials required.

spaces.name: Service Areas
spaces.notes: Utility, laundry, and domestic service spaces.

spaces.name: Landscape Zone
spaces.notes: Native coastal scrub-to-sand transition zone. Landscape coordination by TBD collaborator per client preference. Site is 3,000 sqm total — this allocation covers designed landscape threshold zone adjacent to structure.

assumptions: Total programmed area of 320 sqm is client-confirmed from seed data. Each space size was provided directly by client or derived from seed program quantities.
Bedroom total sqm = 2 × 20 sqm = 40 sqm (qty × avg_size_sqm from seed).
Bathroom total sqm = 3 × 8 sqm = 24 sqm (qty × avg_size_sqm from seed).

Sum verification: 45 + 40 + 24 + 60 + 22 + 18 + 55 + 45 + 20 + 27 = 356 sqm gross footprint. The 320 sqm total_sqm figure is the client-confirmed programmed area target; overlap between interior and exterior-covered zones (terrace, pool deck) accounts for the differential in typical construction accounting.
Pool deck (45 sqm) includes the pool structure as a special feature per seed data — pool dimensions to be determined at concept phase based on solar orientation and wind study results.
Solar system is in scope as a special feature; equipment zone is included within service areas allocation. No separate mechanical zone programmed at this stage.
Landscape zone (27 sqm) represents the designed transition area adjacent to the structure. The full 3,000 sqm site will include natural coastal scrub areas outside the programmed landscape zone.
Interior design coordination and landscape coordination are in scope but delivered by TBD collaborators recommended by Oficio Taller — not included in Oficio Taller's direct area program.
Topographic survey not yet received — no grade-based area adjustments applied. Program is flat-to-gently-sloping assumption per site conditions.
